'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 33''', also styled as '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 33''',  was the 33rd issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Prequel Update]]
*New Hopes
*[[Jawa's Corner]]
*The Cantina
*[[Star Wars Q&A|''Star Wars'' Q&A]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Dark Force Rising: An Interview with Ian McDiarmid]]" {{C|[[Star Wars Insider 53|''Star Wars Insider'' 53]]}}
*"[[Getting to the Bottom of the Topps Star Wars Trading Cards|Getting to the Bottom of the Topps ''Star Wars'' Trading Cards]]" {{C|from 'Star Wars Insider'' 53}}
*"Imperial Walkers on the North Ridge! Top Ten ''Star Wars'' Vehicles!"
*:<small>It's time to count down the Top 10 ''Star Wars'' land, sea and air vehicles.</small>
